checks.label: Supabase auth + REST
checks.action: Set Supabase project URL and anon key before claiming cross-device account sync.

checks.label: OAuth redirect
checks.action: Configured.

checks.label: Free schedule source
checks.detail: TheSportsDB free route is available for schedule, score, event status and limited lineup/stat enrichment continuity
checks.action: Configured.

checks.label: Free feed CORS proxy
checks.detail: Optional VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL missing; set VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1 when /data-proxy/proxy is deployed on the app origin
checks.action: Deploy server/data-proxy-worker.mjs as a Worker URL, or deploy the bundled Cloudflare Pages function at /data-proxy/proxy and set VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1.

checks.label: Lineups + injuries
checks.detail: Missing VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with server-side APIFOOTBALL_KEY
checks.action: Configure API-Football directly for diagnostics, or deploy the data proxy with server-side APIFOOTBALL_KEY to fetch fixture lineups, injuries and richer odds without exposing the key.

checks.label: Odds /盘口
checks.action: Configure API-Football odds directly, deploy the data proxy with server-side APIFOOTBALL_KEY/ODDS_API_KEY, or set VITE_ODDS_API_KEY plus VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY for diagnostics.

checks.label: Paid/free backup feed
checks.action: Add Football-Data.org as a backup fixture and score route if quota allows.

checks.label: Browser seal endpoint
checks.detail: Missing VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_API; set VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_SAME_ORIGIN=1 when a production seal API is mounted at /seal on the app origin
checks.action: Deploy the seal API as an HTTPS /seal endpoint, or mount it behind the app origin at /seal and set VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_SAME_ORIGIN=1; clients use POST /seal?async=1 and GET /jobs/:id.

checks.label: Upload token
checks.action: Require a bearer token before browser uploads can spend backend sealing resources.

checks.label: Public HTTPS app URL
checks.action: Configured.

checks.label: Public share image bucket
checks.action: Configured.

checks.label: Build base path
checks.action: Keep BASE_URL aligned with the deployed path so static assets resolve correctly.

checks.label: Public app root
checks.action: Deploy the final dist folder to the configured HTTPS URL.

checks.label: Published acceptance evidence
checks.action: Run bun run verify:acceptance before bun run build and deploy dist.

checks.label: Published runtime config
checks.detail: missing VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1, VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_API or VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_SAME_ORIGIN=1, VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN
checks.action: Run bun run runtime:config, bun run runtime:config:check, build and redeploy dist/runtime-config.js.

checks.label: Published deployment evidence
checks.action: Run bun run deploy:pages && bun run deploy:evidence, then publish public-deployment-evidence.json.

checks.label: Published logo asset
checks.action: Deploy static assets from dist/assets.

checks.label: Backend schema health
checks.action: Apply supabase.schema.sql and verify grants/RLS policies.

checks.label: Supabase Auth target user
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_USER_ID and local-only SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, then rerun verify:production.

checks.label: Supabase Auth/profile identity match
checks.action: Sync the signed-in Supabase profile, then rerun verify:production with SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY set locally.

checks.label: Global leaderboard current user
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_USER_ID to a synced user that appears in kickoff_leaderboard.

checks.label: Friend leaderboard current user
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_USER_ID and KICKOFF_VERIFY_FRIEND_CODE for a synced leaderboard row.

checks.label: Season leaderboard current user
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_USER_ID and KICKOFF_VERIFY_SEASON_KEY for a synced leaderboard row.

checks.label: Public profile target row
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROFILE_ID to a synced public profile id.

checks.label: Public prediction target row
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROOF_ID to a synced prediction capsule id.

checks.label: Public mode proof target rows
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_IDS to synced mode proof run ids.

checks.label: Public record share artifact target row
checks.action: Generate a record share card, upload it to Supabase Storage, and sync kickoff_share_artifacts.

checks.label: Public mode share artifact target rows
checks.action: Generate mode proof share cards, upload them to Supabase Storage, and sync kickoff_share_artifacts.

checks.label: Public record share channel target row
checks.action: Open the X intent or native share for the record proof card, then sync kickoff_share_artifacts.

checks.label: Public mode share channel target rows
checks.action: Open the X intent or native share for every mode proof card, then sync kickoff_share_artifacts.

checks.label: Static hosting data proxy health
checks.action: Deploy server/data-proxy-worker.mjs as a Worker URL, or deploy the bundled Cloudflare Pages function and set VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1.

checks.label: TheSportsDB season feed
checks.action: Configure VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or keep direct public feed access healthy for continuity.

checks.label: ESPN World Cup scoreboard
checks.action: Configure VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or keep direct public feed access healthy for continuity.

checks.label: worldcup26 games feed
checks.action: Configure VITE_DATA_PROXY_URL or keep direct public feed access healthy for continuity.

checks.label: Free public football feed continuity
checks.detail: TheSportsDB season feed:HTTP 429, World Cup payload missing · ESPN World Cup scoreboard:ok · worldcup26 games feed:ok
checks.action: Keep TheSportsDB or ESPN reachable so schedule/score continuity does not depend on seed data.

checks.label: API-Football enrichment read-back
checks.detail: Missing VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or deployed data proxy with server-side APIFOOTBALL_KEY
checks.action: Configure direct VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY for diagnostics, or deploy the data proxy with server-side APIFOOTBALL_KEY and set KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_IDS to verify lineups, injuries, odds and standings.

checks.label: Seal API production health
checks.action: Deploy the seal API and configure VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_API, or mount it on Cloudflare Pages Functions at /seal and set VITE_FILECOIN_SEAL_SAME_ORIGIN=1.

checks.label: Seal API async endpoint contract
checks.action: Deploy the seal API with POST /seal?async=1, GET /jobs/:id, GET /verify?cid= and GET /proof/:cid.

checks.label: Record CID proof read-back
checks.action: Run a production one-click seal for one prediction capsule and set KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_RECORD_CID plus KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_RECORD_PAYLOAD_HASH.

checks.label: Mode CID proof read-back
checks.action: Run production one-click seals for every required tournament mode proof and set KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_CIDS plus KICKOFF_VERIFY_FILECOIN_MODE_PAYLOAD_HASHES.

checks.label: Public profile link
checks.detail: rendered profile proof page for kickoff-production-seed
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROFILE_ID to a synced Supabase profile id.

checks.label: Public prediction proof link
checks.detail: rendered proof proof page for cap-prod-73dc2618d1f9
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_PROOF_ID to a synced capsule id.

checks.label: Public mode proof links
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_IDS to synced mode proof run ids.

checks.label: Clean-session account restore
checks.detail: clean-session cloud restore missing profile:kickoff-production-seed (fixture fallback or local-only page rendered); proof:cap-prod-73dc2618d1f9 (fixture fallback or local-only page rendered); mode:mode-prod-bracket-f90d6276 (fixture fallback or local-only page rendered); mode:mode-prod-parlay-77bf4ef2 (fixture fallback or local-only page rendered); mode:mode-prod-agent-vs-human-f8b27b3a (fixture fallback or local-only page rendered); mode:mode-prod-upset-9f6dd619 (fixture fallback or local-only page rendered); mode:mode-prod-group-path-b533c118 (fixture fallback or local-only page rendered)
checks.action: Set profile/proof/mode verification ids to real Supabase targets, deploy public pages, then render Cloud-loaded pages in a clean browser context without relying on localStorage.

checks.label: Public share image URL
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_SHARE_IMAGE_URL to a deployed HTTPS PNG/JPEG/WebP share-card URL that reads back as a production-sized image.

checks.label: Public mode share image URL
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL to a deployed HTTPS PNG/JPEG/WebP mode share-card URL that reads back as a production-sized image.
